name: yourwifey-ralph-wiggum-loop
description: Bounded Codex exec loop for YourWifey productization checkpoints.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded YourWifey polish, review, efficiency, product, and memory checkpoints.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex exec loop for bounded YourWifey implementation passes. Each iteration reads the relevant status doc, picks one narrow patch, verifies it, updates the status doc, and stops only on a real completion promise.
defaultPrompt: Read docs/PRODUCTIZATION_RALPH_STATUS.md or the lane-specific status doc.
Make the next smallest verified YourWifey patch.
Update status and commit coherent checkpoints.
